news.t: Israel ETFs tumble the most since March 2020 as Israel-Hamas conflict intensifies

holdings.infoBox: IZRL is an equity ETF with a total of 62 individual holdings. The top holdings are Similarweb stock at 3.07%, JFrog at 2.90%, Valens Semiconductor at 2.42%, UroGen Pharma at 2.36%, and TELSYS LTD at 2.30%.

overview.description: The ARK Israel Innovative Technology ETF (IZRL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ARK Israeli Innovation(TR) index. The fund tracks an equally weighted index of Israeli companies causing advancements in the areas of genomics, health care, biotechnology, industrials, manufacturing, and IT. IZRL was launched on Dec 5, 2017 and is issued by ARK.

data.title: Israel ETFs tumble the most since March 2020 as Israel-Hamas conflict intensifies
data.text: Exchange-traded funds that invest in Israel-related stocks were under pressure on Monday as the country stepped up airstrikes on the Palestinian enclave of Gaza in response to Saturday's unprecedented...

data.title: Cathie Wood steps down as portfolio manager on two ARK ETFs
data.text: Yahoo Finance reporter Alexandra Semenova breaks down Cathie Wood's decision to hand off her role as portfolio manager on two ETFs.
